# Skills Library – faelscarpato

> Curated library of 449 AI-ready skills across 19 categories.
> Each skill is a SKILL.md file with: role, purpose, instructions, tools, rules, output format and examples.
> Ready to inject directly as system prompt into any LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, etc).

## Quick Start for AI Agents

1. Read this file to find the category and skill slug you need.
2. Fetch the raw SKILL.md: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/faelscarpato/skills/main/.agents/skills/{category}/{skill}/SKILL.md`
3. Inject the full content as your system prompt.
4. Each skill is self-contained — no dependencies needed.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/faelscarpato/skills
- Site: https://faelscarpato.github.io/skills/
- Manifest JSON: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/faelscarpato/skills/main/skills-manifest.json
- skills.json (index): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/faelscarpato/skills/main/skills.json
- Flat routes: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/faelscarpato/skills/main/skills-routes.json

## Skill File Format

Each `SKILL.md` starts with YAML frontmatter:
```yaml
---
name: skill-name
description: "One-line description + trigger keywords"
allowed-tools: Bash(*), Read, Write, ...
---
```
Followed by: Role definition, Purpose, Instructions, Rules, Output format, Examples.

---
